workAuthorization: Indian citizen, no visa sponsorship required for India-based roles
summary: Senior DevOps / Platform Engineer with nearly 7 years of experience designing, automating, and operating cloud-native infrastructure across GCP, AWS, and Azure. Strong foundation in GKE, Terraform, CI/CD, and cloud security, plus hands-on experience building production MLOps/LLMOps platforms with Vertex AI, MLflow, KServe, and Kubernetes-based GenAI workloads.

introductionAndBackground: Tell us a little about yourself based on your resume.
Tell us about your recent experience at Capgemini and Tech Mahindra.
You have around seven years of experience, right?
Are you currently based in Noida?
Tell me about your cloud and DevOps expertise.
If you want to showcase your strengths, what would you highlight?

What challenges are there in packaging everything without Helm?

What have you done with Python?

What integrations did your Python script use?
What exactly did your Python code do internally?

standardAnswers.availability: Last working day 16th Sept 2026, negotiable if required
standardAnswers.work authorization: Yes, authorized to work in India
standardAnswers.kubernetes services: Hands-on with Kubernetes Services including ClusterIP, NodePort, LoadBalancer, Ingress-backed exposure, service discovery, and troubleshooting service-to-pod routing issues.
standardAnswers.service mesh: Hands-on with service mesh concepts including mTLS, traffic splitting, retries, timeouts, circuit breaking, observability, and canary or blue-green release patterns using Istio-style architectures.
standardAnswers.istio: Hands-on with Istio-style service mesh patterns for secure service-to-service communication, traffic management, telemetry, and progressive delivery in Kubernetes environments.
standardAnswers.gke: Hands-on with Google Kubernetes Engine including cluster operations, workload deployment, autoscaling, networking, IAM integration, observability, and Terraform-based infrastructure automation.
standardAnswers.google kubernetes engine: Hands-on with Google Kubernetes Engine including cluster operations, workload deployment, autoscaling, networking, IAM integration, observability, and Terraform-based infrastructure automation.
standardAnswers.aks: Working knowledge of Azure Kubernetes Service including cluster operations, workload deployment, ingress, autoscaling, monitoring, and CI/CD integration for containerized applications.
standardAnswers.azure kubernetes service: Working knowledge of Azure Kubernetes Service including cluster operations, workload deployment, ingress, autoscaling, monitoring, and CI/CD integration for containerized applications.
